title: Inheritance PASS: [107] QA_CORE_SPEC.v1 → [111] QA_AREA_QUANTIZATION_PK_CERT.v1
_fixture_purpose: Certifies the inheritance edge from kernel [107] to [111] QA_AREA_QUANTIZATION_PK_CERT.v1, the inert-prime generalization of [108]. Like [108], [111] is a family_extension of the kernel that adds domain-specific theorem claims (discrete norm-form spectrum for arbitrary p^k moduli) on top of the base gate policy. The child adds PRIME_NOT_INERT, MODULUS_MISMATCH, SPECTRUM_MISMATCH, FORBIDDEN_SET_MISMATCH to the kernel failure algebra, consistent with IC5 (superset extension). IC6 and IC7 are not applicable (no logging contract or invariant refs in [111] v1).
